author: lOrm
content: Closing as tracked-future-roadmap-not-active-bug. Phase 1 of #440 landed (READ_TRACKER per-session bucketing via SessionIdGuard pattern). Phase 2 (SessionState owning read_tracker/todo/shells/chainlink-install flag, deleting LazyLock globals, Drop-based shell termination) is a structural refactor — no active bug exists; the audit's concrete defect is closed. Re-file when team has slack to complete the audit's full mandated refactor.
